prs.title: Update Docker Images
prs.author: app/red-hat-konflux
prs.diff_excerpt:
diff --git a/Dockerfile b/Dockerfile
index 630e6d7..54ea74e 100644
--- a/Dockerfile
+++ b/Dockerfile
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ COPY . .
 RUN GOFIPS140=v1.0.0 go build -tags=no_openssl -buildvcs=false -o rhtas_console ./cmd/rhtas_console
 
 # Final stage
-FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:9.8-1782797275
+FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:9.8-1784092902
 
 # Set a writable working directory
 WORKDIR /tmp
diff --git a/Dockerfile.rh b/Dockerfile.rh
index 4ef40bd..660f124 100644
--- a/Dockerfile.rh
+++ b/Dockerfile.rh
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # Build stage
-FROM registry.redhat.io/ubi9/go-toolset:9.8-1784076237@sha256:dba8f7f9cc231f4729be36df146684940d2517bab9721f8f90c246915e190a9a AS builder
+FROM registry.redhat.io/ubi9/go-toolset:9.8-1784190466@sha256:ad9d042375cef55890db3378ced9d0cebd74656bc8dc4c3b0cdbea31b85ce459 AS builder
 
 WORKDIR /app
 
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ COPY . .
 RUN GOFIPS140=v1.0.0 go build -tags=no_openssl -buildvcs=false -o rhtas_console ./cmd/rhtas_console
 
 # Final stage
-FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal@sha256:463cae32c6f6f5594b11a5c22de275016bd8545ce58a6373388e8b24f13fc15c
+FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal@sha256:062c52ff973065752b0965787649db2bcf551a6c727a00e95a3eb42cebadbdab
 
 # Set a writable working directory
 WORKDIR /tmp

prs.title: chore(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 7
prs.author: app/dependabot
prs.diff_excerpt:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 5220483..7600d92 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ jobs:
       matrix:
         node-version: [20, 22, 24]
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
 
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/codeql.yml b/.github/workflows/codeql.yml
index f55bebc..c089a3a 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/codeql.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/codeql.yml
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ jobs:
       matrix:
         language: [javascript-typescript]
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
 
       - uses: github/codeql-action/init@v4
         with:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/deploy_docs.yml b/.github/workflows/deploy_docs.yml
index 9075b08..6a465b2 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/deploy_docs.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/deploy_docs.yml
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ jobs:
   build:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
 
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/release.yml b/.github/workflows/release.yml
index a2b40c5..8bda858 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/release.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/release.yml
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
           fi
           echo "VERSION=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
 
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
 
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
